meta.description: Blog posts from Tebra's The Intake blog, the content resource for Kareo/Tebra customers covering healthcare practice management, billing, and clinical topics.

posts.title: How integrated behavioral health improves patient outcomes in primary care
posts.author: Lisa Eramo
posts.description: Explores implementation strategies for integrated behavioral health models to enhance mental health outcomes and strengthen care coordination in primary care settings.

posts.title: Is self-diagnosis on social media helping or hurting people's health?
posts.description: Examines the impact of social media-based self-diagnosis on patient health outcomes and the role of providers in guiding patients to accurate information.

posts.title: Physician burnout by specialty 2025: Navigating stress in the healthcare industry
posts.description: Analyzes burnout patterns across different medical specialties and strategies for managing workplace stress in independent practices.

posts.title: How to identify and escalate systemic underpayments by payer
posts.author: Lisa Eramo
posts.description: Provides guidance on recognizing and addressing recurring payment discrepancies from insurance carriers, including documentation strategies and escalation workflows.
